channel.title: +2020s on ज्योतिषम् py
channel.description: Recent content in +2020s on ज्योतिषम् py

item.description: 00 Intro Related files ics Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (मद्रपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH 2020-01 2020-01-01 पौषः-10-06,कुम्भः-पूर्वप्रोष्ठपदा🌛🌌◢◣धनुः-पूर्वाषाढा-09-17🌌🌞◢◣सहस्यः-10-11🪐🌞 Indian civil date: 1941-10-11, Islamic: 1441-05-05 Jumādā al-ʾAwwal/ʾŪlā संवत्सरः - विकारी वर्षसङ्ख्या 🌛- शकाब्दः 1941, विक्रमाब्दः 2076, कलियुगे 5120 🪐🌞ऋतुमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः उत्तरायणम् 🌌🌞सौरमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः दक्षिणायनम् 🌛चान्द्रमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः पौषः खचक्रस्थितिः |🌞-🌛|तिथिः — शुक्ल-षष्ठी►18:27; शुक्ल-सप्तमी► वासरः—बुधः 🌌🌛नक्षत्रम् — पूर्वप्रोष्ठपदा►28:20*; उत्तरप्रोष्ठपदा► (मीनः) 🌌🌞सौर-नक्षत्रम् — पूर्वाषाढा► 🌛+🌞योगः — व्यतीपातः►21:45; वरीयान्► २|🌛-🌞|करणम् — तैतिलः►18:27; गरः► 🌌🌛- चन्द्राष्टम-राशिः—सिंहः दिनमान-कालविभागाः 🌅सूर्योदयः—06:34-12:12🌞️-17:49🌇 🌛चन्द्रोदयः—10:50; चन्द्रास्तमयः—23:04 🌞⚝भट्टभास्कर-मते वीर्यवन्तः— प्रातः—06:34-07:59; साङ्गवः—09:23-10:47; मध्याह्नः—12:12-13:36; अपराह्णः—15:00-16:25; सायाह्नः—17:49-19:25 🌞⚝सायण-मते वीर्यवन्तः— प्रातः-मु॰1—06:34-07:19; प्रातः-मु॰2—07:19-08:04; साङ्गवः-मु॰2—09:34-10:19; पूर्वाह्णः-मु॰2—11:49-12:34; अपराह्णः-मु॰2—14:04-14:49; सायाह्णः-मु॰2—16:19-17:04; सायाह्णः-मु॰3—17:04-17:49 🌞कालान्तरम्— ब्राह्मं मुहूर्तम्—04:52-05:43; मध्यरात्रिः—22:55-01:28 राहुकालः—12:12-13:36; यमघण्टः—07:59-09:23; गुलिककालः—10:47-12:12 शूलम्—उदीची दिक् (►12:34); परिहारः–क्षीरम् उत्सवाः महाधनुर्व्यतीपात-स्नानम्, षष्ठी-व्रतम्, महाधनुर्व्यतीपात-श्राद्धम् षष्ठी-व्रतम् Monthly Shashthi vratam for Lord Subrahmanya.

00 Intro Related files ics Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (मद्रपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-tropical, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH 2021-01 2021-01-01 मार्गशीर्षः-09-17,कर्कटः-पुष्यः🌛🌌◢◣धनुः-पूर्वाषाढा-09-17🌌🌞◢◣सहस्यः-10-12🪐🌞शुक्रः Indian civil date: 1942-10-11, Islamic: 1442-05-17 Jumādā al-ʾAwwal/ʾŪlā संवत्सरः - शार्वरी वर्षसङ्ख्या 🌛- शकाब्दः 1942, विक्रमाब्दः 2077, कलियुगे 5121 🪐🌞ऋतुमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः उत्तरायणम् 🌌🌞सौरमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः दक्षिणायनम् 🌛चान्द्रमानम् — हेमन्तऋतुः मार्गशीर्षः खचक्रस्थितिः |🌞-🌛|तिथिः — कृष्ण-द्वितीया►09:33; कृष्ण-तृतीया► 🌌🌛नक्षत्रम् — पुष्यः►20:13; आश्रेषा► (कर्कटः) 🌌🌞सौर-नक्षत्रम् — पूर्वाषाढा► 🌛+🌞योगः — वैधृतिः►13:33; विष्कम्भः► २|🌛-🌞|करणम् — गरः►09:33; वणिजः►21:25; विष्टिः► 🌌🌛- चन्द्राष्टम-राशिः—धनुः 🌞-🪐 मूढग्रहाः - बुधः (-6.

item.title: 2023 Summary (चि॰)
item.description: Intro Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (मद्रपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic-non-tropical, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-indic-tropical, mahApuruSha/sci-tech, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanmAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/luno-tropical/smArta, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH Table

item.title: 2023(चि॰)
item.description: 00 Intro Related files ics Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (मद्रपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic-non-tropical, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-indic-tropical, mahApuruSha/sci-tech, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanmAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/luno-tropical/smArta, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH 2023-01 2023-01-01 (चि॰)

item.title: 2024 Summary (चि॰)
item.description: Intro Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (मद्रपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic-non-tropical, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-indic-tropical, mahApuruSha/sci-tech, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanmAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/luno-tropical/smArta, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH, time_focus/kalpAdiH, time_focus/manvAdiH Table

item.title: 2024(चि॰)
item.description: 00 Intro Related files ics Computation parameters 🌏क्षेत्रम् (मद्रपुरी) Basic parameters lunar_month_assigner_type = "MULTI_NEW_MOON_SIDEREAL_MONTH_ADHIKA" ayanaamsha_id = "CHITRA_AT_180" jsonClass = "ComputationSystem" [graha_lopa_measures] jsonClass = "GrahaLopaMeasures" [graha_lopa_measures.graha_id_to_lopa_measure] jupiter = 11 venus = 9 mercury = 13 mars = 17 saturn = 15 Event options aparaahna_as_second_half = false prefer_eight_fold_day_division = false julian_handling = "converted to Gregorian" jsonClass = "FestivalOptions" Repos: devatA/gaNapati, devatA/graha, devatA/kaumAra, devatA/lakShmI, devatA/misc-fauna, devatA/misc-flora, devatA/nadI, devatA/pitR, devatA/shaiva, devatA/shakti, devatA/devIparva, devatA/dashamahAvidyA, devatA/umA, devatA/vaiShNava, gRhya/Apastamba, gRhya/general, general, mahApuruSha/ALvAr, mahApuruSha/RShi, mahApuruSha/general-indic-non-tropical, mahApuruSha/kAnchI-maTha, mahApuruSha/general-indic-tropical, mahApuruSha/sci-tech, mahApuruSha/zRGgErI-maTha, mahApuruSha/mAdhva-misc, mahApuruSha/nAyanmAr, mahApuruSha/sangIta-kRt, mahApuruSha/smArta-misc, mahApuruSha/vaiShNava-misc, mahApuruSha/xatra, mahApuruSha/xatra-later, tamil, temples/Andhra, temples/Kerala, temples/North, temples/Odisha, temples/Tamil, temples/venkaTAchala, time_focus/Eclipses, time_focus/amrita-siddhi, time_focus/Rtu, time_focus/luno-tropical/smArta, time_focus/misc, time_focus/misc_combinations, time_focus/special-tithis, time_focus/tithi-vara-combinations, time_focus/monthly/amAvAsyA, time_focus/monthly/dvAdashI, time_focus/monthly/ekAdashI, time_focus/monthly/pradoSha, time_focus/nakShatra, time_focus/puShkara, time_focus/sankrAnti, time_focus/yugAdiH, time_focus/kalpAdiH, time_focus/manvAdiH 2024-01 2024-01-01 (चि॰)
